label: Russia-Ukraine War Anniversary and Global Response

timeline.event: Fourth Anniversary of Russia-Ukraine War Marked
timeline.description: Marking the fourth year since Russia's invasion, President Zelenskyy declared Ukrainians remain unbroken as European leaders visited Kyiv.

timeline.event: UK Announces Largest Sanctions Package Against Russia
timeline.description: The UK government rolled out its most extensive sanctions package since 2022, targeting Russian oil revenues and military suppliers.

timeline.event: UN General Assembly Calls for Ukraine Ceasefire
timeline.description: The UN General Assembly passed a resolution demanding an immediate ceasefire and a comprehensive peace agreement in Ukraine.

timeline.event: South Africa Repatriates Citizens Lured to Fight in Ukraine
timeline.description: The South African government is working to bring home 11 men who were allegedly lured into fighting for Russian forces in Ukraine.
